content.cn_text: 第二部分。
content.en_text: Section 2.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一名导游在花园里向一群游客讲话。
content.en_text: You will hear a guide talking to a group of visitors in a garden.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第11至14题。
content.en_text: First, you'll have some time to look at questions 11-14.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至14题。
content.en_text: Now, listen carefully and answer questions 11-14.

content.cn_text: 大家好，欢迎来到 Pine Garden。我叫 Manuel，我想先给大家介绍一下我们的园区，
content.en_text: Hello, welcome to Pine Garden. My name is Manuel and I'd like to tell you a few things about our establishment

content.cn_text: 然后大家就可以自由参观这片园地。
content.en_text: before you all wander off and begin your exploration of the grounds.

content.cn_text: 我知道大家都很想开始参观，所以我会尽量简短。
content.en_text: I know you're keen to begin, so I'll try to keep this short.

content.cn_text: 首先，我想说明一下你们的门票包含哪些内容。
content.en_text: First of all, I'd like to explain what you can do with your ticket.

content.cn_text: 如果你想更亲近自然，可以参观我们的种植区。
content.en_text: If you want to be closer to nature, you could visit our planting area.

content.cn_text: 在那里，游客可以种植小花和球茎，它们会生长并成为花园的一部分。
content.en_text: In that area, visitors can plant small flowers and bulbs that will grow and become part of the garden.

content.cn_text: 种植活动完全免费。
content.en_text: The planting activity is completely free.

content.cn_text: 不过，如果你的手比较敏感，需要购买园艺手套来保护皮肤。
content.en_text: However, if you have sensitive hands, you'll need to purchase garden gloves to protect your skin.

content.cn_text: 在 Pine Garden，我们出售许多木制品，这些木制品由我们自己松树林中砍伐的树木雕刻而成。
content.en_text: Here at Pine Garden, we sell a number of wooden goods, carved from trees that have been felled in our very own pine forest.

content.cn_text: 如果你想参与其中并亲自尝试，
content.en_text: If you feel like getting involved and having a go yourself,

content.cn_text: 你可以参加我们的灌木木工课程之一，免费参加，在熟练工匠的指导下制作自己的钥匙扣。
content.en_text: you can join one of our bush timbering lessons, free of charge, where you'll be able to make your own keyring under the supervision of a skilled craftsman.

content.cn_text: 花园中最受欢迎的景点是我们的鸟舍，在那里你可以观察各种鸟类。
content.en_text: The most popular attraction in the garden is our aviary, where you can observe a whole range of bird species.

content.cn_text: 这个区域免费进入，但如果要进入蜂鸟区，需要额外支付一小笔费用。
content.en_text: Entry to this section is free, but you have to pay a small supplement in order to enter the hummingbird section.

content.cn_text: 此外，离那里不远的昆虫小屋可能会引起你的兴趣，在那里你可以看到一些有趣的昆虫，如蝴蝶、小瓢虫、蜻蜓等等。
content.en_text: Also, the insect hut not far from it may arouse your interest, there you can find some interesting insects such as butterflies, pocket ladybugs, dragonflies, and so on.

content.cn_text: 而且这不需要额外收费。
content.en_text: And there's no extra charge for that.

content.cn_text: 遗憾的是，今天有些区域暂时不对游客开放。
content.en_text: Unfortunately, there are some areas that are temporarily off limits to visitors today.

content.cn_text: 例如，礼品店今年早些时候关闭了，还要大约一个月才会重新开放。
content.en_text: For example, the gift shop that closed earlier this year and won't be open for another month or so.

content.cn_text: 不过，正如我之前提到的，你们可以去我们的餐厅用餐和买小吃；如果你想买礼物，不妨从我们的植物护理中心给特别的人买一盆灌木或兰花。
content.en_text: As I mentioned before, however, you're free to visit our restaurant for food and snacks, and if you're looking to purchase a gift, why not buy that special someone a potted bush or orchid from our plant care centre.

content.cn_text: 我们的新树顶咖啡馆正在建设中，建成后会非常壮观。
content.en_text: And our new treetop cafe is under construction, which will be very impressive when it's finished.

content.cn_text: 事实上，模型小镇已经提前开放，并且吸引了很多人。
content.en_text: In fact, the model town's already open ahead of schedule, and it's attracting a lot of people.

content.cn_text: 我们的游客办公室通常可以为游客提供各种帮助。然而，今天工作人员生病在家。
content.en_text: Now, our tourist office is normally available to provide tourists with a variety of help. However, the officer is sick at home today.

content.cn_text: 请不要因此打消参观这些地方的念头，因为它们会带来很棒的体验。
content.en_text: Please do not let this discourage you from visiting these as they provide quite an experience.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余讲话之前，你有一些时间查看第15至20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the talk, you'll have some time to look at questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第15至20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 15 to 20.

content.cn_text: 我还想向大家介绍我们的植物专家，他们负责 Pine Garden 这里精彩的植物展示。
content.en_text: I also would like to introduce you to our plant specialists who are responsible for the wonderful plant displays here at Pine Garden.

content.cn_text: Mary 女士是我们的专家之一，她亲自负责展示那些自然生长在本地地区的美丽植物。
content.en_text: Mrs Mary is one of our experts, and she is personally responsible for our beautiful display of plants that are all found growing naturally in the local area.

content.cn_text: Berson 先生负责一项困难任务：种植适合比我们这里更干燥、更炎热气候的植物品种，这意味着我们不必在现场储水。
content.en_text: Mr. Berson has the difficult task of growing varieties of plants that are suited to much drier and hotter climates than ours, which means we do not have to store water on site.

content.cn_text: 如果你参观玻璃温室，就能看到许多他成功培育的植物，它们不需要雨水或灌溉。
content.en_text: If you visit the glass house, you'll be able to see many plants that he has managed to cultivate without the need for rain or irrigation.

content.cn_text: Smith 先生负责我们餐厅里可以食用的农产品，范围包括地下生长的品种，以及长在树上和灌木上的品种。
content.en_text: Mr. Smith is responsible for the produce that you can eat in our restaurant, which ranges from varieties that grow under the ground to those that grow on trees and bushes.

content.cn_text: 这位 Noony 先生是我们关于世界上最常见植物草的专家。
content.en_text: Now Mr. Noony here is our expert on the most commonly growing plant in the world, grass.

content.cn_text: 你们可能已经注意到，我们的园地多么翠绿茂盛，这都归功于他的专业知识。
content.en_text: You may have noticed how beautifully green and lush our grounds are thanks to his specialist knowledge.

content.cn_text: Scanlon 先生确保我们的土壤充满养分，从而支持和促进自然栖息地。
content.en_text: Mr. Scanlon ensures that our soil is full of nutrients so that the natural habitat is supported and encouraged.

content.cn_text: 他通过使用自己创造的特殊配方给土地施肥来做到这一点。
content.en_text: He does this by fertilising the earth with a special formula of his own creation.

content.cn_text: 最后，我想向大家介绍 Mandelson 博士。
content.en_text: Finally, I would like to introduce you all to Dr. Mandelson.

content.cn_text: 他是我们景观团队的经理，并与其他专家密切合作，确保大家共同创造出既美丽又可持续的景观。
content.en_text: He is the manager of our landscaping team and works closely with our other experts to ensure that everyone works together to create a landscape that is both beautiful and sustainable.

content.cn_text: 好了，基本就介绍到这里。现在有人有问题吗？
content.en_text: Well, that just about rounds it up. Now if anyone has any questions?

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 非常感谢。
content.en_text: Thank you very much.

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Pine Garden Which TWO things are included in the price of the tour?
groups.title: Questions 11–12

items.title: Pine Garden Which TWO things are included in the price of the tour?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11-12题问哪两项包含在旅游票价中。原文说 bush timbering lessons free of charge，insect hut no extra charge 且有 ladybugs，因此答案是 B 和 C。garden gloves 和 hummingbirds 都需要额外付费。

items.title: Pine Garden Which TWO things are included in the price of the tour?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11-12题问哪两项包含在旅游票价中。原文说 bush timbering lessons free of charge，insect hut no extra charge 且有 ladybugs，因此答案是 B 和 C。garden gloves 和 hummingbirds 都需要额外付费。

groups.desc:
Choose TWO letters, A–E.
Which TWO facilities of Pine Garden are open today?
groups.title: Questions 13 and 14

items.title: Which TWO facilities of Pine Garden are open today?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13-14题问今天开放的两个设施。原文说可去 plant care centre，model town 已开放；gift shop 关闭，cafe 在施工，tourist office 工作人员生病。因此答案是 A 和 D。

items.title: Which TWO facilities of Pine Garden are open today?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13-14题问今天开放的两个设施。原文说可去 plant care centre，model town 已开放；gift shop 关闭，cafe 在施工，tourist office 工作人员生病。因此答案是 A 和 D。

groups.desc: Choose SIX answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–H, next to questions 15–20.
groups.title: Questions 15–20

items.title: Mary
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题 Mary 负责本地自然生长的植物，对应 D “native plants”。

items.title: Berson
items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题 Berson 负责适合干热气候的植物，对应 A “varieties of desert”。

items.title: Smith
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题 Smith 负责餐厅可食用的植物，对应 B “edible plants”。

items.title: Nunee
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题 Nunee/Noony 负责草地相关内容，对应 C “lawns and lawn alternatives”。

items.title: Scanlan
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题 Scanlan/Scanlon 负责土壤养分，对应 H “soil nutrients”。

items.title: Mandelson
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题 Mandelson 负责整体景观团队协作和统一景观设计，对应 G “unified design”。
